title: DescribeImportTasksRequest
description: DescribeImportTasksRequest schema from Amazon Application Discovery Service API

name.description: The name, status, or import task ID for a specific import task.

values.description: An array of strings that you can provide to match against a specific name, status, or import task ID to filter your import task.

filters.description: An array of name-value pairs that you provide to filter the results for the DescribeImportTask request to a specific subset of results.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of results that you want this request to return.

nextToken.description: The token to request a specific page of results.
